summary: Iteration 24 - AI Trade Journal Feature VERIFIED. All 16 backend tests passed. All 11 main tabs and 3 journal sub-tabs work correctly. Empty state displays properly with Review All Trades button.

issues: Minor React hydration warning about <span> in <option> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Journal routes correctly return empty arrays/objects when no entries exist
TradeJournal.js component properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
All 3 sub-tabs (Trade Reviews, Patterns & Stats, AI Insights) correctly implemented with data-testid
Review All Trades button correctly triggers POST /api/journal/review-all
Backend journal routes correctly handle filtering (verdict, sector, mode, min_rating)
AI insights endpoint properly falls back when no journal entries exist

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All tabs and sub-tabs clickable and functional)

seed_data_creation: None - testing empty/initial state as expected per requirements
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Trade Journal feature is fully implemented and working. All 4 journal endpoints (GET entries, GET stats, GET insights, POST review-all) return success. Frontend shows AI Journal tab with 3 sub-tabs: Trade Reviews, Patterns & Stats, AI Insights. Empty state displays properly. To generate journal entries, close some trades first then click Review All Trades button.

journal_entries_api.result: Returns status=success with empty entries array (count=0)

journal_review_all_api.result: Returns status=success, message='All trades already reviewed', reviewed=0

frontend_journal_tab.test: AI Journal tab visible and clickable
frontend_journal_tab.result: Tab found with data-testid='journal-tab', clicks successfully

frontend_trade_reviews_subtab.result: Found with data-testid='journal-entries-tab', shows empty state with robot icon

frontend_ai_insights_subtab.result: Found with data-testid='journal-insights-tab', shows Refresh Insights button

mocked_apis_note: No APIs mocked. All endpoints return real data from FastAPI backend.
